sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31128" key="ei(matopw/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἱματο-πώλης</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἱματο-φυλάκιον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἱματο-φύλαξ</orth>, <sense id="n31128.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱματ</ref> </xr>-.</sense> </entryFree>
